riemannKernelNormalizationConsequenceSta.label: Riemann Phi/Xi normalization positivity consequence
riemannKernelNormalizationConsequenceSta.reason: The fixed even Fourier representation Xi(z)=int Phi(t)e^{izt}dt and any harmless scalar convention preserve the positivity statements used by the Weyl/KLM external foundation.

proof: Import the full Riemann kernel normalization theorem.
Export only the positivity-preserving Phi/Xi normalization consequence.
